replace: He won't show up if you haven't completed the quests to unlock the daily hub. He is found circling high above the Sanctuary of Malorne. His spawn timer is 6-17 hours. He flies up very high. Located in The Waking Shores. Found atop a plateau southeast of Obsidian Citadel (approximately 33,76). Currently, you can only tame this undead gryphon while you're still levelling, or soon after reaching 70, as it relies on a quirk of level scaling, as there's an intended delay with NPCs scaling to your new level. Advance your level to at least 62-63, so that the creatures of the Waking Shore are (temporarily) around two levels lower than you. Slurpo is normally set to scale 2 levels higher than the regular creatures, but the delay in level increase means that it should actually appear at your level. Some time after you reach 70, it will scale up to 72 and remain untameable until the next expansion.

Located in The Waking Shores. Currently, you can only tame Slurpo while you're still levelling, or soon after reaching 70, as it relies on a quirk of level scaling, as there's an intended delay with NPCs scaling to your new level. Slurpo is normally set to scale 2 levels higher than the regular creatures, but the delay in level increase means that it should actually appear at your level. Some time after you reach 70, it will scale up to 72 and remain untameable until the next expansion.

search: Remove your armor to survive tame.
replace: Remove your armor to survive tame. If the regrowth is still on fire for you and you see Nemesis walking around, you are in the wrong phase (the Flamewake phase) and Ankha won't spawn no matter how long you wait. To see Ankha, you have to do the Hyjal questline for the Flamewake phase to become The Regrowth phase. You need to at least complete the available Hyjal quest lines and complete the quest 'The Sanctuary Must Not Fall' when Malfurion summons Malorne in a cut-scene.
